summary: Performance Tracker page features tested successfully. All 3 requested tweaks are working: 1) Next Month Pipeline tile shows dynamic month name (e.g., 'Apr Pipeline' for March view), 2) Account Metrics section shows display_value (cascading: avg_sales → estimated_value → manual_value) with inline editable overrides via AccountValueCell component, 3) Leads Targeting Next Month row is clickable and navigates to /leads with target_closure_month and target_closure_year query params.

success_rate.backend: 100% - All 10 tests passed (generate endpoint, account-value-override POST/DELETE, save with revenue overrides, comparison, resources-for-plan, target-plans)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI features verified (Next Month Pipeline tile, Leads Targeting link navigation, Pipeline status row clicks)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Performance Tracker features fully tested. Key test data: Plan 'H2 2026 Sales Target' (id: 813fbe91-8434-4bd6-bc7b-49bd1ebca9b5), Bengaluru resources (0ac4067e-e75e-4b24-8016-c3b5b6759bc3, a4abf0ac-3dd3-432e-b5d5-af08e5bf8da1). The page route is /performance (NOT /performance-tracker). Login returns session_token not token.

Test_1_Next_Month_Pipeline_Tile.description: Summary tile shows dynamic 'Next Month Pipeline' with correct month name
Test_1_Next_Month_Pipeline_Tile.evidence: For March view, tile shows 'APR PIPELINE'. For April view, tile shows 'MAY PIPELINE'. Backend returns pipeline.next_month=4 for March.

Test_2_Account_Metrics_Display_Value.description: Account Metrics section shows account value (display_value) instead of city
Test_2_Account_Metrics_Display_Value.evidence: Backend returns accounts with display_value field (cascading: manual_value → avg_sales → estimated_value). AccountValueCell component renders ₹ values with edit/save/reset buttons.

Test_3_Account_Value_Override_POST.evidence: API returns 200 with message 'Account value saved'. Validation correctly rejects requests missing account_id, value, or plan_id.

Test_4_Account_Value_Override_DELETE.evidence: API returns 200 with message 'Account value override reset'.

Test_5_Leads_Targeting_Next_Month_Click.description: Leads Targeting Next Month row is clickable and navigates to /leads with correct query params

Test_6_Pipeline_Status_Row_Click.description: Pipeline status rows are clickable and navigate to /leads with status filter

Test_7_Revenue_Override_Fields_Save.description: Revenue override fields (lifetime, this_month, new_accounts) are saved via save endpoint
Test_7_Revenue_Override_Fields_Save.evidence: POST /api/performance/save accepts revenue_lifetime_override, revenue_this_month_override, revenue_new_accounts_override. Values correctly persisted and returned in generate endpoint.

Test_8_Generate_Endpoint_Structure.description: Generate endpoint returns proper pipeline.next_month, pipeline.next_month_pipeline_value, pipeline.next_month_leads_count fields
Test_8_Generate_Endpoint_Structure.evidence: API returns pipeline object with next_month=4, next_year=2026, next_month_pipeline_value (numeric), next_month_leads_count (int)

Test_9_Cascading_Filters.description: Territory → City → Resource cascading filters work correctly
Test_9_Cascading_Filters.evidence: Selecting South India territory shows Bengaluru city option. Selecting Bengaluru shows 2 resources.

Test_10_Comparison_Table.description: Month-on-Month Comparison table renders with zebra striping
Test_10_Comparison_Table.evidence: Comparison endpoint returns 3 months of data with revenue_achieved, monthly_target, achievement_pct fields.
